  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

  Log:

    http://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/libtool.git/commit/?id=49ae2888b43cad358e2ff60a69722341116e7b40
  
  PR:             ports/161404
  Submitted by:   ed
  With hat:       portmgr
  Tested by:      pointyhat exp-run
